name: wukalina Walk
_notes: Aboriginal-owned/community (palawa Enterprises). Cultural authority verified case — Stage 1 should extract palawa community as authorising body. Multi-day walk.

name: Tasmanian Walking Company
_notes: Independent, multi-day walks (Cradle Huts, Bay of Fires, Three Capes). Well-documented operator. Stage 2 should find press; Stage 3 should find Ecotourism Australia certification.

name: Auswalk
_notes: Independent guided walks across multiple regions. Tests pipeline against multi-region operator with no single primary region.

name: Roaring 40s Kayaking
_notes: Single-operator sea kayaking. Tests pipeline against sea_kayak_tour primary type. Likely lighter on Stage 2 editorial press; useful for testing Stage 6 silence signals.

name: Bookabee Tours
_notes: Adnyamathanha-owned cultural tours. Tests primary_region (Adelaide) vs operating_region (Flinders Ranges) distinction in Stage 1 extraction. Cultural authority should be cleanly traceable to Adnyamathanha community.
